items.title: Why C3.ai Stock Soared 51% in November
items.author: Jeremy Bowman
items.description: C3.ai's stock surged 51% in November due to a new partnership with Microsoft and strong results from Palantir. The partnership with Microsoft is expected to accelerate the adoption of C3.ai's Enterprise AI platform on Azure cloud infrastructure.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article reports that C3.ai's stock surged 51% in November due to a new partnership with Microsoft and strong results from Palantir, indicating positive sentiment towards the company.

The article highlights the new strategic alliance between C3.ai and Microsoft to accelerate the adoption of C3.ai's Enterprise AI platform on Microsoft's Azure cloud infrastructure, suggesting a positive sentiment towards the partnership.

items.title: Vietnam Enterprise ICT Intelligence Report 2024 - Vietnam's ICT Market Reached Over $15 Billion in 2023 and is Forecast to Grow at a CAGR of Over 15% During 2023-2028 to Reach Over $32 Billion in 2028
items.author: Na
items.description: Vietnam's ICT market is expected to grow at a CAGR of over 15% from 2023 to 2028, reaching over $32 billion. The growth is driven by digital transformation in the public sector and cloud computing adoption.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Microsoft is a key player in the enterprise ICT market in Vietnam, providing software and cloud computing solutions to support the country's digital transformation.
Hitachi is mentioned as one of the key ICT vendors in Vietnam, indicating its involvement in the country's enterprise ICT market.
Apple is mentioned as one of the key ICT vendors in Vietnam, but its specific role or impact in the market is not clearly stated.
KDDI Corp. is mentioned as one of the key ICT vendors in Vietnam, but its specific contribution to the market is not elaborated on.

items.title: Blockchain Distributed Ledger  Opportunities and Strategies Report 2024: Market to Grow by Over $905 Billion by 2033 - Enhancing Commercial Operations Through Advanced Blockchain Platforms
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: The global blockchain distributed ledger market is expected to grow from $17.12 billion in 2023 to $925.84 billion in 2033, driven by the rise in digital currencies, e-commerce, and financial sector growth. Factors that could hinder growth include the limited availability of skilled personnel.
